channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts

item.title: Worldcoin teeters on a sub-0.20 breakdown—oversold, but still selling. Will $0.18-0.20 hold? 💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260501-price-prediction-wld-sub-020-breakdown-imminent-as-bears #Crypto #Worldcoin #WLD

item.title: OP risks a drop to $0.10–$0.11 as momentum fades and consolidation breaks. Will the bears prevail in the 48-hour window? 🔻 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260501-price-prediction-op-010-support-test-dead-ahead-48 #Optimism #OP #CryptoNews
